title: EpiGePT: a Pretrained Transformer model for epigenomics.
author: Gao Z Liu Q Zeng W Jiang R Wong WH
content: S-EPMC10370089 PMC10370089 EpiGePT: a Pretrained Transformer model for epigenomics.
